---
title: "GitHub Pages Example"
format: html
---

# Welcome

Welcome to my GitHub Pages site for BIO/CHEM 806: Applied Data Science. This site documents my coursework, coding exercises, data analysis projects, and scientific computing workflows developed throughout the semester using R, Quarto, GitHub, and reproducible research practices.

# Project Description

This repository contains assignments, reports, and analytical projects completed for BIO/CHEM 806. The course integrates biological and chemical research with data science methods, including function writing, data visualization, reproducible workflows, and scientific communication.

My work focuses on applying computational tools to real scientific problems in biology and chemistry.

# Analysis

### This site expands on the following tasks completed throughout the semester:

1. Quarto reports

2. R function development

3. Data visualization projects

4. Reproducible research workflows

5. Scientific, biological survey data analyses and interpretations

6. Git/GitHub collaboration exercises
